# Upload N-Triples to named graph
endpoint: upload
classification: spec-required
match_mode: status-only
description: POST /upload?graph=<uri> with N-Triples returns 2xx

=== request
POST /upload?graph=http%3A%2F%2Fexample.org%2Fg1
Content-Type: application/n-triples

<http://example.org/u3> <http://example.org/p> "v" .

=== response
200
